description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray finish and a minimalist design. The front features a large, glossy display with a thin bezel and a centered webcam at the top. The keyboard is black with white markings, and the touchpad is centrally located below the keyboard. The back of the lid displays a prominent black Apple logo, indicating it is a MacBook. The sides of the laptop show a few ports, likely USB-C and a headphone jack, with a thin profile and rounded edges. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, hard surface and a sleek, professional appearance.
description: A sleek, metallic gray MacBook laptop with a large display, black keyboard, and prominent Apple logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display, black keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid gray lid with a centered black Apple logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and additional ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid, easily recognizable by its bitten apple shape.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring black keys with white markings.
